name: Chase the Ace Ticket Checker
description: Paste your Chase the Ace lottery ticket numbers and instantly check them against the winning number.

name: Circle Calculator
description: Compute radius, diameter, circumference, and area from any one circle measurement.

name: 3 Doors
description: A 3-door survival game — pick a door each round; 2 are safe and 1 ends your streak.

name: Game Scorer
description: A flexible multi-player round-by-round scorer with customizable player names and round tracking.

name: League Scorer
description: Track scores for a two-team, four-player bowling league series with handicap and per-game totals.

name: Christmas Tree Reaction Trainer
description: An NHRA drag-racing style reaction time trainer with Sport, Pro, and Super Pro staging modes.

name: Initiative Tracker
description: A tabletop RPG combat tracker — manage turn order, tag conditions, and count rounds for D&D and similar games.

name: Bar Math
description: A speed-based mental math game — calculate the total barbell weight from plate combinations as fast as you can.

name: 7 Wonders Duel Scorer
description: Scorer for the board game, 7 Wonders Duel. Includes scoring for Angora expansion.

name: Spin It!
description: A dazzling spinning wheel and coin-flip randomizer — load it up with your options and let fate make the call.

name: Delayed Timer
description: A clean countdown timer with a fully customizable delay — set your prep time, hit start, and let the beeps tell you when it's go time.
